This classification places Hebeclinium phoenicticum within the order Gentianales, which is a larger group that also includes the families Gentianaceae and Loganiaceae. Hebeclinium phoenicticum is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, where it can be found growing in a variety of habitats. The exact classification of Hebeclinium phoenicticum can be further refined at the genus and species levels, with some sources recognizing it as a member of the genus Himatanthus.
